calendar.matters:
MOTION To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-01-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Daniel B. Hoye, Esq. 357-4600 for pltf & opposing party; David H.S. Commins, Esq. 391-6490 for defts/x-complainants & moving parties Gary Fanger, Travel Nurse Data Bank, Lesley King and Diana Palacio.
RULING: Argued and defts motion to enforce settlement agreement for dismissal of complaint and cross complaint granted by the Court. Mr. Commins to prepare order.

MOTION For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-01-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Daniel B. Hoye, Esq. 357-4600 for pltf & moving party; David H.S. Commins, Esq. 391-6490 for defts/x-complainants & opposing parties Gary Fanger, Travel Nurse Data Bank, Lesley King and Diana Palacio.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Mr. Commins to prepare order.
